title: How to 10x Your Claude Code Projects (Karpathy's Method)
summary: Austin Marchese breaks down three strategies attributed to Andrej Karpathy for scaling Claude Code productivity: LLM knowledge bases, auto-research, and context engineering. The video frames these approaches as methods to significantly increase software development output.
